meta.title: WP Sudo — In-Editor Two-Factor Reauthentication Demo
meta.author: dknauss
meta.description: Demonstrates the block-editor (Gutenberg) sudo reauth modal completing a two-factor (TOTP) step in place: installing a block from the inserter trips WP Sudo's gate, the in-editor modal takes the password, then renders the real Two Factor TOTP field (Milestone B server-rendered provider partial) inside the same modal to grant the sudo session and resume the request.

steps.code: <?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $mu = defined('WPMU_PLUGIN_DIR') ? WPMU_PLUGIN_DIR : WP_CONTENT_DIR . '/mu-plugins'; if ( is_dir( $mu ) === false ) { mkdir( $mu, 0777, true ); } file_put_contents( $mu . '/wp-sudo-demo-editor-2fa.php', base64_decode('') ); echo 'wrote mu-plugin';

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $user = get_user_by('login', 'admin'); if ($user) { wp_set_password('password', $user->ID); wp_set_current_user($user->ID); update_user_meta((int) $user->ID, '_two_factor_totp_key', 'JBSWY3DPEHPK3PXP'); update_user_meta((int) $user->ID, '_two_factor_enabled_providers', array('Two_Factor_Totp')); update_user_meta((int) $user->ID, '_two_factor_provider', 'Two_Factor_Totp'); } echo 'enrolled admin in TOTP';

<?php require_once '/wordpress/wp-load.php'; $admin = get_user_by('login', 'admin'); if ($admin) { foreach (array('_wp_sudo_expires','_wp_sudo_token','_wp_sudo_failed_attempts','_wp_sudo_lockout_until','_wp_sudo_failure_event','_wp_sudo_throttle_until') as $key) { delete_user_meta((int) $admin->ID, $key); } } echo 'Two Factor + WP Sudo active; admin has TOTP two-factor enabled and arrives with NO sudo session (every fresh editor load starts session-less). Admin password: password. Demo: open the block inserter (+), search a Block-Directory block (e.g. "Contact Form 7"), click to install it; the in-editor sudo modal appears; enter the password, then the two-factor code shown in the editor notice (or compute the current TOTP for secret JBSWY3DPEHPK3PXP) to grant the session and resume the request in place.';
